title: M.Tech in Data Science
content: The Master of Technology in CSE–Data Science at the School of Computer Science & Engineering is a two-year, full-time postgraduate program focused on equipping students with the analytical, computational, and technological skills required to extract meaningful insights from data. This learner-centric, industry-aligned, and research-driven program fosters critical thinking and innovation through a rigorous blend of theory and hands-on learning. The curriculum integrates foundational computer science courses with specialized electives in data science, along with a significant project or dissertation component. Students gain practical exposure to data handling, statistical analysis, machine learning, data visualization, and big data technologies, preparing them to solve real-world problems using data-driven approaches. Designed for aspiring data scientists, engineers, and researchers, this program offers a robust pathway for graduates to advance their careers in data-intensive industries, research organizations, and academia, contributing to the growing demand for skilled professionals in the data science domain. B.E/B.Tech/MCA/M.Sc in relevant discipline with minimum 50% marks or equivalent in CGPA Students with a CUET / GATE score will be given preference in the merit list. 01 02 An ability to write and present a substantial technical report/document. 03 01 02 03 01 Have the ability to work with emerging technologies in computing requisite to Industry 4.0. 02
